title: Catoblastus maynensis

The plant is a type of tree, known for its large, showy flowers. The classification of Catoblastus maynensis is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. The plant is classified as a member of the order Magnoliales.

intro: Catoblastus maynensis, also known as the Cat's Claw vine, is a woody vine native to the Amazon rainforest. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and lower blood pressure.
